song.title: What a Friend We Have in Jesus
song.lyrics:
[V1] 1) What a Friend we have in Jesus, All our sins and griefs to bear! What a privilege to carry Everything to God in prayer!|| O what peace we often forfeit, O what needless pain we bear, All because we do not carry Everything to God in prayer!
[V2] 2) Have we trials and temptations? Is there trouble anywhere? We should never be discouraged, Take it to the Lord in prayer.|| Can we find a friend so faithful Who will all our sorrows share? Jesus knows our every weakness, Take it to the Lord in prayer.
[V3] 3) Are we weak and heavy-laden, Cumbered with a load of care? Precious Savior, still our Refuge— Take it to the Lord in prayer.|| Do thy friends despise, forsake thee? Take it to the Lord in prayer; In His arms He’ll take and shield thee, Thou wilt find a solace there.
[V4] 4) Blessed Savior, Thou hast promised Thou wilt all our burdens bear; May we ever, Lord, be bringing All to Thee in earnest prayer.|| Soon in glory bright unclouded There will be no need for prayer; Rapture, praise, and endless worship Will be our sweet portion there.
song.author: Joseph M. Scriven
